tweets.aiAnalysis:
# Why This Tweet Underperformed

The tweet relies heavily on insider-knowledge positioning ("smart money") and specific yield metrics (545% APY) that create skepticism rather than trust—high APY claims on crypto assets typically trigger caution among experienced traders rather than excitement, especially without context on sustainability or risk. The vague emotional appeal ("Tremendous") and lack of visual content (chart, screenshot, or comparison) fail to provide the concrete proof needed to overcome the inherent incredulity around outsized returns, limiting engagement to a niche audience already familiar with the protocol.

mostInteresting.reason: Jupiter Lend significantly increased Max LTV to 80% and liquidation threshold to 85% across all SOL/Stable pairs.
